name: deepsec
description: Use deepsec (an AI-powered vulnerability scanner) — running scans, configuring projects, writing matchers, and authoring plugins.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 deepsec 相關工作
幫我啟用 deepsec 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 deepsec

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

examples.intent: Use the deepsec skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
